videoSnippet.title: Lotus Chess June Arena - lichess.org
videoSnippet.description:
https://lichess.org/tournament/flxzsKhU
Even if you missed the first 4 tournaments, you can still play the remaining 8 and be a part of the tour! (best 9 tournament results count!)

Hello Everyone!
We are back stronger than ever! The new arena is here and is also a part of the 2026 Lotus Chess Tour!

1st Prize – $200
2nd Prize– 3-month subscription to Lotus Chess
3rd Prize – 3-month subscription to Lotus Chess
4th Prize – 3-month subscription to Lotus Chess
5th Prize – 3-month subscription to Lotus Chess
6th Prize – 3-month subscription to Lotus Chess
Secret Prize - $100 - Winner selected on random (must complete the tournament)

2026 Lotus Chess Tour – ANNOUNCEMENT

We’re excited to launch the 2026 Lotus Chess Tour.

12 tournaments throughout the year
Best 9 results count toward the final standings
Play all 12 and drop your worst 3 — or play just 9 and skip 3

Yearly Prize Pool
€900
€400
€200

A dedicated website IS LIVE where you can track live standings and scores tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

The journey continues!

DOWNLOAD LOTUS CHESS HERE onelink.to/lotus-agadmator
